subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. We’d be happy to set up a meeting to discuss potential collaboration. We can offer the following meeting windows:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If one of those works for you, please send over your preferred slot and we can take it from there.

Regarding internal contact details, we’re not able to share internal directory information or direct contact details. Please use the contact information available on our public website for any additional outreach.

Best regards
